tts: Cleared for takeoff. A little upward bend on the back edge of each wing adds lift and pulls the nose up.
Tempting, but no. Throwing harder just makes it nose-dive faster, and with more conviction.
Bold, but wrong. Weighting the nose makes a nose-dive worse, not better.
Grounded. Not a folding solution, but an understandable one. The wings are still the answer.
